What You Get

Everything a Gamer Needs

Powered by the IGDB game database, GameVault gives you the tools to build your gaming identity and stay connected with other players.

🎮

Search Any Game

Access hundreds of thousands of titles from IGDB. Find any game by name with instant results, cover art, and detailed info.

⭐

Rate & Review

Leave star ratings and written reviews for games you've played. Build your personal review history over time.

📰

Global Feed

See what games the community is reviewing right now. Switch between Global and Following feeds to stay up to date.

👤

Gamer Profile

Set up your gamer tag, favorite genres, Discord and Twitch handles. Show off your favorite games and review history.

🤖

AI Recommendations

Not sure what to play next? Ask our AI assistant for personalized game recommendations based on your taste.

❤️

Favorites List

Save games you love to your favorites and keep a running log of everything you want to play or remember.

About the App

Built for Gamers

GameVault is a Letterboxd-style mobile app built specifically for video game enthusiasts. Whether you want to log every game you've ever played, share your hot takes with the community, or discover your next favorite title, GameVault is the place to do it.

With a clean, dark interface designed for gamers, real-time community reviews, and IGDB-powered game data, GameVault puts everything you need in one place.
